NKJV.1: A Praise of David. I will extol You, my God, O King; And I will bless Your name forever and ever.
NKJV.2: Every day I will bless You, And I will praise Your name forever and ever.
NKJV.3: Great is the LORD, and greatly to be praised; And His greatness is unsearchable.
NKJV.4: One generation shall praise Your works to another, And shall declare Your mighty acts.
NKJV.5: I will meditate on the glorious splendor of Your majesty, And on Your wondrous works.
NKJV.6: Men shall speak of the might of Your awesome acts, And I will declare Your greatness.
NKJV.7: They shall utter the memory of Your great goodness, And shall sing of Your righteousness.
NKJV.8: The LORD is gracious and full of compassion, Slow to anger and great in mercy.
NKJV.9: The LORD is good to all, And His tender mercies are over all His works.
NKJV.10: All Your works shall praise You, O LORD, And Your saints shall bless You.
NKJV.11: They shall speak of the glory of Your kingdom, And talk of Your power,
NKJV.12: To make known to the sons of men His mighty acts, And the glorious majesty of His kingdom.
NKJV.13: Your kingdom is an everlasting kingdom, And Your dominion endures throughout all generations.
NKJV.14: The LORD upholds all who fall, And raises up all who are bowed down.
NKJV.15: The eyes of all look expectantly to You, And You give them their food in due season.
NKJV.16: You open Your hand  And satisfy the desire of every living thing.
NKJV.17: The LORD is righteous in all His ways, Gracious in all His works.
NKJV.18: The LORD is near to all who call upon Him, To all who call upon Him in truth.
NKJV.19: He will fulfill the desire of those who fear Him; He also will hear their cry and save them.
NKJV.20: The LORD preserves all who love Him, But all the wicked He will destroy.
NKJV.21: My mouth shall speak the praise of the LORD, And all flesh shall bless His holy name Forever and ever.

KJV.14: The LORD<S>3068</S> upholdeth<S>5564</S> all that fall<S>5307</S>, and raiseth up<S>2210</S> all those that be bowed down<S>3721</S>.
KJV.15: The eyes<S>5869</S> of all wait<S>7663</S> upon thee; and thou givest<S>5414</S> them their meat<S>400</S> in due season<S>6256</S>. <sup>wait: or, look unto</sup>
KJV.16: Thou openest<S>6605</S> thine hand<S>3027</S>, and satisfiest<S>7646</S> the desire<S>7522</S> of every living thing<S>2416</S>.
KJV.17: The LORD<S>3068</S> is righteous<S>6662</S> in all his ways<S>1870</S>, and holy<S>2623</S> in all his works<S>4639</S>. <sup>holy: or, merciful, or, bountiful</sup>

ESV.1: I will extol you, my God and King, and bless your name forever and ever.
ESV.2: Every day I will bless you and praise your name forever and ever.
ESV.3: Great is the LORD, and greatly to be praised, and his greatness is unsearchable.
ESV.4: One generation shall commend your works to another, and shall declare your mighty acts.
ESV.5: On the glorious splendor of your majesty, and on your wondrous works, I will meditate.
ESV.6: They shall speak of the might of your awesome deeds, and I will declare your greatness.
ESV.7: They shall pour forth the fame of your abundant goodness and shall sing aloud of your righteousness.
ESV.8: The LORD is gracious and merciful, slow to anger and abounding in steadfast love.
ESV.9: The LORD is good to all, and his mercy is over all that he has made.
ESV.10: All your works shall give thanks to you, O LORD, and all your saints shall bless you!
ESV.11: They shall speak of the glory of your kingdom and tell of your power,
ESV.12: to make known to the children of man your  mighty deeds, and the glorious splendor of your kingdom.
ESV.13: Your kingdom is an everlasting kingdom, and your dominion endures throughout all generations.  [The LORD is faithful in all his words and kind in all his works.]
ESV.14: The LORD upholds all who are falling and raises up all who are bowed down.
ESV.15: The eyes of all look to you, and you give them their food in due season.
ESV.16: You open your hand; you satisfy the desire of every living thing.
ESV.17: The LORD is righteous in all his ways and kind in all his works.
ESV.18: The LORD is near to all who call on him, to all who call on him in truth.
ESV.19: He fulfills the desire of those who fear him; he also hears their cry and saves them.
ESV.20: The LORD preserves all who love him, but all the wicked he will destroy.
ESV.21: My mouth will speak the praise of the LORD, and let all flesh bless his holy name forever and ever.

NASB.1: [A Psalm] of Praise, of David. I will extol You, my God, O King, And I will bless Your name forever and ever.
NASB.2: Every day I will bless You, And I will praise Your name forever and ever.
NASB.3: Great is the LORD, and highly to be praised, And His greatness is unsearchable.
NASB.4: One generation shall praise Your works to another, And shall declare Your mighty acts.
NASB.5: On the glorious splendor of Your majesty And on Your wonderful works, I will meditate.
NASB.6: Men shall speak of the power of Your awesome acts, And I will tell of Your greatness.
NASB.7: They shall eagerly utter the memory of Your abundant goodness And will shout joyfully of Your righteousness.
NASB.8: The LORD is gracious and merciful; Slow to anger and great in lovingkindness.
NASB.9: The LORD is good to all, And His mercies are over all His works.
NASB.10: All Your works shall give thanks to You, O LORD, And Your godly ones shall bless You.
NASB.11: They shall speak of the glory of Your kingdom And talk of Your power;
NASB.12: To make known to the sons of men Your mighty acts And the glory of the majesty of Your kingdom.
NASB.13: Your kingdom is an everlasting kingdom, And Your dominion [endures] throughout all generations.
NASB.14: The LORD sustains all who fall And raises up all who are bowed down.
NASB.15: The eyes of all look to You, And You give them their food in due time.
NASB.16: You open Your hand And satisfy the desire of every living thing.
NASB.17: The LORD is righteous in all His ways And kind in all His deeds.
NASB.18: The LORD is near to all who call upon Him, To all who call upon Him in truth.
NASB.19: He will fulfill the desire of those who fear Him; He will also hear their cry and will save them.
NASB.20: The LORD keeps all who love Him, But all the wicked He will destroy.
NASB.21: My mouth will speak the praise of the LORD, And all flesh will bless His holy name forever and ever.

NLT.1:
I will exalt you, my God and King,
and praise your name forever and ever.
NLT.2:
I will praise you every day;
yes, I will praise you forever.
NLT.3:
Great is the LORD! He is most worthy of praise!
No one can measure his greatness.
NLT.4:
Let each generation tell its children of your mighty acts;
let them proclaim your power.
NLT.5:
I will meditate on your majestic, glorious splendor
and your wonderful miracles.
NLT.6:
Your awe-inspiring deeds will be on every tongue;
I will proclaim your greatness.
NLT.7:
Everyone will share the story of your wonderful goodness;
they will sing with joy about your righteousness.
NLT.8:
The LORD is merciful and compassionate,
slow to get angry and filled with unfailing love.
NLT.9:
The LORD is good to everyone.
He showers compassion on all his creation.
NLT.10:
All of your works will thank you, LORD,
and your faithful followers will praise you.
NLT.11:
They will speak of the glory of your kingdom;
they will give examples of your power.
NLT.12:
They will tell about your mighty deeds
and about the majesty and glory of your reign.
NLT.13:
For your kingdom is an everlasting kingdom.
You rule throughout all generations.
The LORD always keeps his promises;
he is gracious in all he does.
NLT.14:
The LORD helps the fallen
and lifts those bent beneath their loads.
NLT.15:
The eyes of all look to you in hope;
you give them their food as they need it.
NLT.16:
When you open your hand,
you satisfy the hunger and thirst of every living thing.
NLT.17:
The LORD is righteous in everything he does;
he is filled with kindness.
NLT.18:
The LORD is close to all who call on him,
yes, to all who call on him in truth.
NLT.19:
He grants the desires of those who fear him;
he hears their cries for help and rescues them.
NLT.20:
The LORD protects all those who love him,
but he destroys the wicked.
NLT.21:
I will praise the LORD,
and may everyone on earth bless his holy name
forever and ever.

WEB.1: A praise psalm by David. I will exalt you, my God, the King. I will praise your name forever and ever.
WEB.2: Every day I will praise you. I will extol your name forever and ever.
WEB.3: Great is Yahweh, and greatly to be praised! His greatness is unsearchable.
WEB.4: One generation will commend your works to another, and will declare your mighty acts.
WEB.5: Of the glorious majesty of your honor, of your wondrous works, I will meditate.
WEB.6: Men will speak of the might of your awesome acts. I will declare your greatness.
WEB.7: They will utter the memory of your great goodness, and will sing of your righteousness.
WEB.8: Yahweh is gracious, merciful, slow to anger, and of great loving kindness.
WEB.9: Yahweh is good to all. His tender mercies are over all his works.
WEB.10: All your works will give thanks to you, Yahweh. Your saints will extol you.
WEB.11: They will speak of the glory of your kingdom, and talk about your power;
WEB.12: to make known to the sons of men his mighty acts, the glory of the majesty of his kingdom.
WEB.13: Your kingdom is an everlasting kingdom. Your dominion endures throughout all generations. Yahweh is faithful in all his words, and loving in all his deeds.
WEB.14: Yahweh upholds all who fall, and raises up all those who are bowed down.
WEB.15: The eyes of all wait for you. You give them their food in due season.
WEB.16: You open your hand, and satisfy the desire of every living thing.
WEB.17: Yahweh is righteous in all his ways, and gracious in all his works.
WEB.18: Yahweh is near to all those who call on him, to all who call on him in truth.
WEB.19: He will fulfill the desire of those who fear him. He also will hear their cry, and will save them.
WEB.20: Yahweh preserves all those who love him, but all the wicked he will destroy.
WEB.21: My mouth will speak the praise of Yahweh. Let all flesh bless his holy name forever and ever.

AMP.1:
A Psalm of praise. Of David. I will exalt You, my God, O King,
And [with gratitude and submissive wonder] I will bless Your name forever and ever.
AMP.2:
Every day I will bless You and lovingly praise You;
Yes, [with awe-inspired reverence] I will praise Your name forever and ever.
AMP.3:
Great is the LORD, and highly to be praised,
And His greatness is [so vast and profound as to be] unsearchable [incomprehensible to man].
AMP.4:
One generation shall praise Your works to another,
And shall declare Your mighty and remarkable acts.
AMP.5:
On the glorious splendor of Your majesty
And on Your wonderful works, I will meditate.
AMP.6:
People will speak of the power of Your awesome acts,
And [with gratitude and submissive wonder] I will tell of Your greatness.
AMP.7:
They will overflow [like a fountain] when they speak of Your great and abundant goodness
And will sing joyfully of Your righteousness.
AMP.8:
The LORD is gracious and full of compassion,
Slow to anger and abounding in lovingkindness.
AMP.9:
The LORD is good to all,
And His tender mercies are over all His works [the entirety of things created].
AMP.10:
All Your works shall give thanks to You and praise You, O LORD,
And Your godly ones will bless You.
AMP.11:
They shall speak of the glory of Your kingdom
And talk of Your power,
AMP.12:
To make known to the sons of men Your mighty acts
And the glorious majesty of Your kingdom.
AMP.13:
Your kingdom is an everlasting kingdom,
And Your dominion endures throughout all generations.
AMP.14:
The LORD upholds all those [of His own] who fall
And raises up all those who are bowed down.
AMP.15:
The eyes of all look to You [in hopeful expectation],
And You give them their food in due time.
AMP.16:
You open Your hand
And satisfy the desire of every living thing.
AMP.17:
The LORD is [unwaveringly] righteous in all His ways
And gracious and kind in all His works.
AMP.18:
The LORD is near to all who call on Him,
To all who call on Him in truth (without guile).
AMP.19:
He will fulfill the desire of those who fear and worship Him [with awe-inspired reverence and obedience];
He also will hear their cry and will save them.
AMP.20:
The LORD keeps all who love Him,
But all the wicked He will destroy.
AMP.21:
My mouth will speak the praise of the LORD,
And all flesh will bless and gratefully praise His holy name forever and ever.

MSG.1:
David's praise
I lift you high in praise, my God, O my King!
and I'll bless your name into eternity.
MSG.2:
I'll bless you every day,
and keep it up from now to eternity.
MSG.3:
God is magnificent; he can never be praised enough.
There are no boundaries to his greatness.
MSG.4:
Generation after generation stands in awe of your work;
each one tells stories of your mighty acts.
MSG.5:
Your beauty and splendor have everyone talking;
I compose songs on your wonders.
MSG.6:
Your marvelous doings are headline news;
I could write a book full of the details of your greatness.
MSG.7:
The fame of your goodness spreads across the country;
your righteousness is on everyone's lips.
MSG.8:
God is all mercy and grace—
not quick to anger, is rich in love.
MSG.9:
God is good to one and all;
everything he does is suffused with grace.
MSG.10: Creation and creatures applaud you, God;
MSG.11:
your holy people bless you.
They talk about the glories of your rule,
they exclaim over your splendor,
MSG.12:
Letting the world know of your power for good,
the lavish splendor of your kingdom.
MSG.13:
Your kingdom is a kingdom eternal;
you never get voted out of office.
God always does what he says,
and is gracious in everything he does.
MSG.14:
God gives a hand to those down on their luck,
gives a fresh start to those ready to quit.
MSG.15:
All eyes are on you, expectant;
you give them their meals on time.
MSG.16:
Generous to a fault,
you lavish your favor on all creatures.
MSG.17:
Everything God does is right—
the trademark on all his works is love.
MSG.18:
God's there, listening for all who pray,
for all who pray and mean it.
MSG.19:
He does what's best for those who fear him—
hears them call out, and saves them.
MSG.20:
God sticks by all who love him,
but it's all over for those who don't.
MSG.21:
My mouth is filled with God's praise.
Let everything living bless him,
bless his holy name from now to eternity!

NIV.1:
Psalm 145
A psalm of praise. Of David.
I will exalt you, my God the King;
I will praise your name for ever and ever.
NIV.2:
Every day I will praise you
and extol your name for ever and ever.
NIV.3:
Great is the Lord and most worthy of praise;
his greatness no one can fathom.
NIV.4:
One generation will commend your works to another;
they will tell of your mighty acts.
NIV.5:
They will speak of the glorious splendor of your majesty,
and I will meditate on your wonderful works.
NIV.6:
They will tell of the power of your awesome works,
and I will proclaim your great deeds.
NIV.7:
They will celebrate your abundant goodness
and joyfully sing of your righteousness.
NIV.8:
The Lord is gracious and compassionate,
slow to anger and rich in love.
NIV.9:
The Lord is good to all;
he has compassion on all he has made.
NIV.10:
All you have made will praise you, O Lord;
your saints will extol you.
NIV.11:
They will tell of the glory of your kingdom
and speak of your might,
NIV.12:
so that all men may know of your mighty acts
and the glorious splendor of your kingdom.
NIV.13:
Your kingdom is an everlasting kingdom,
and your dominion endures through all generations.
The Lord is faithful to all his promises
and loving toward all he has made.
NIV.14:
The Lord upholds all those who fall
and lifts up all who are bowed down.
NIV.15:
The eyes of all look to you,
and you give them their food at the proper time.
NIV.16:
You open your hand
and satisfy the desires of every living thing.
NIV.17:
The Lord is righteous in all his ways
and loving toward all he has made.
NIV.18:
The Lord is near to all who call on him,
to all who call on him in truth.
NIV.19:
He fulfills the desires of those who fear him;
he hears their cry and saves them.
NIV.20:
The Lord watches over all who love him,
but all the wicked he will destroy.
NIV.21:
My mouth will speak in praise of the Lord.
Let every creature praise his holy name
for ever and ever.

NRSVCE.1:
I will extol you, my God and King,
and bless your name forever and ever.
NRSVCE.2:
Every day I will bless you,
and praise your name forever and ever.
NRSVCE.3:
Great is the LORD, and greatly to be praised;
his greatness is unsearchable.
NRSVCE.4:
One generation shall laud your works to another,
and shall declare your mighty acts.
NRSVCE.5:
On the glorious splendor of your majesty,
and on your wondrous works, I will meditate.
NRSVCE.6:
The might of your awesome deeds shall be proclaimed,
and I will declare your greatness.
NRSVCE.7:
They shall celebrate the fame of your abundant goodness,
and shall sing aloud of your righteousness.
NRSVCE.8:
The LORD is gracious and merciful,
slow to anger and abounding in steadfast love.
NRSVCE.9:
The LORD is good to all,
and his compassion is over all that he has made.
NRSVCE.10:
All your works shall give thanks to you, O LORD,
and all your faithful shall bless you.
NRSVCE.11:
They shall speak of the glory of your kingdom,
and tell of your power,
NRSVCE.12:
to make known to all people your mighty deeds,
and the glorious splendor of your kingdom.
NRSVCE.13:
Your kingdom is an everlasting kingdom,
and your dominion endures throughout all generations.
The LORD is faithful in all his words,
and gracious in all his deeds.
NRSVCE.14:
The LORD upholds all who are falling,
and raises up all who are bowed down.
NRSVCE.15:
The eyes of all look to you,
and you give them their food in due season.
NRSVCE.16:
You open your hand,
satisfying the desire of every living thing.
NRSVCE.17:
The LORD is just in all his ways,
and kind in all his doings.
NRSVCE.18:
The LORD is near to all who call on him,
to all who call on him in truth.
NRSVCE.19:
He fulfills the desire of all who fear him;
he also hears their cry, and saves them.
NRSVCE.20:
The LORD watches over all who love him,
but all the wicked he will destroy.
NRSVCE.21:
My mouth will speak the praise of the LORD,
and all flesh will bless his holy name forever and ever.

NET.1: I will extol you, my God, O king! I will praise your name continually!
NET.2: Every day I will praise you! I will praise your name continually!
NET.3: The LORD is great and certainly worthy of praise! No one can fathom his greatness!
NET.4: One generation will praise your deeds to another, and tell about your mighty acts!
NET.5: I will focus on your honor and majestic splendor, and your amazing deeds!
NET.6: They will proclaim the power of your awesome acts! I will declare your great deeds!
NET.7: They will talk about the fame of your great kindness, and sing about your justice.
NET.8: The LORD is merciful and compassionate; he is patient and demonstrates great loyal love.
NET.9: The LORD is good to all, and has compassion on all he has made.
NET.10: All he has made will give thanks to the LORD. Your loyal followers will praise you.
NET.11: They will proclaim the splendor of your kingdom; they will tell about your power,
NET.12: so that mankind might acknowledge your mighty acts, and the majestic splendor of your kingdom.
NET.13: Your kingdom is an eternal kingdom, and your dominion endures through all generations.
NET.14: The LORD supports all who fall, and lifts up all who are bent over.
NET.15: Everything looks to you in anticipation, and you provide them with food on a regular basis.
NET.16: You open your hand, and fill every living thing with the food they desire.
NET.17: The LORD is just in all his actions, and exhibits love in all he does.
NET.18: The LORD is near all who cry out to him, all who cry out to him sincerely.
NET.19: He satisfies the desire of his loyal followers; he hears their cry for help and delivers them.
NET.20: The LORD protects those who love him, but he destroys all the wicked.
NET.21: My mouth will praise the LORD. Let all who live praise his holy name forever!
